tool.name: Image Generation
tool.description: Generate high-quality images from text descriptions using the Imagine model.

prompt.description: Descriptive prompt for the image to generate

negative_prompt.description: What to exclude from the image

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Image Generation
Generate images based on text prompts.

**Capabilities:**
- Text-to-Image generation
- Photorealistic or stylized output

**Usage:**
Call this tool with a detailed prompt describing the desired image.
